arts.ttl: Sporting already in contact as player linked with move to Fulham
arts.sum: Over the past few days, the UK press has linked Fulham with a move for Panathinaikos defender Georgios Vagiannidis. The 23-year-old right-back has been a regular for the Greek club this season, playing 31 times in all competitions.
